title: Magic and Mechanisms
description: A mod with elements of magic. The version with mechanisms soon
body: This is mod with magic(in release 1.0 will appear mechanisms). You can control magic: make a balls of your magic(which one you choise of 3) and shoot his where you look. This balls can damage your enemy. Every magic have different damage. To open a magic, you need to craft a expansion for every magic.![mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8be56d5d17e09410bc69e4695d4e93d739f7e89d.png)![shar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81fdd0ee5bce5cefce63dad9eadb70dfe14d4f5b.png)
